speaker: V
text: The project is on track. We'll ship on the 15th.

speaker: Partner
text: Great. By the way, I loved your point about 'semantic debt'. The idea that every time we use a vague word to describe a complex system, we're taking out a high-interest loan on future clarity.

speaker: V
text: Ha! Yeah, semantic debt will kill a startup faster than technical debt. Anyway, back to the budget...
